message:
feat(a11y): Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance

Add skip link, ARIA live regions, and accessibility testing utilities:

- Add SkipLink component for keyboard navigation (WCAG 2.4.1)
- Add LiveRegion component for screen reader announcements (WCAG 4.1.3)
- Create accessibility utility library (announce, focus management)
- Add useAnnounce hooks for React integration
- Integrate announcements in homepage filter results
- Add @axe-core/playwright for automated accessibility testing
- Create E2E tests for keyboard navigation, screen reader support
- Add a11y-helpers utility for test reuse

Addresses bead jeffreysprompts.com-e7fj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+/**
+ * Accessibility utilities for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
+ */
+
+export {
+  announceToScreenReader,
+  announceCount,
+  clearAnnouncement,
+} from "./announce";
+
+export {
+  getFocusableElements,
+  focusTrap,
+  moveFocusTo,
+  focusFirstError,
+  getActiveElement,
+} from "./focus";
